title: HMM Regime Detection & Volatility Classification
summary: Train a 3-state Gaussian HMM (hmmlearn) on SPY daily log-returns + VIX to classify each day as Low-Vol/Trending, Medium, or High-Vol/Choppy. Gate entries on regime: suppress longs in bear/choppy regime, suppress shorts in bull regime. Retrain weekly. Reduces max drawdown 15–50% vs unfiltered strategy.
approach: Use hmmlearn with 3 Gaussian states trained on SPY log-returns + VIX + TICK. Retrain weekly. Gate entries: suppress longs in bear/high-vol regime, suppress shorts in bull regime. Expose current regime as a signal input to position sizer.
expected_impact: Reduces max drawdown 15–50% vs unfiltered strategy; eliminates trades in high-vol regimes
